seoTitle: Golden Bay vs Goode Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Golden Bay and Goode Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Golden Bay vs Goode Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Golden Bay and Goode Beach.
heading: Golden Bay vs Goode Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Golden Bay, Western Australia and Goode Beach, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Golden Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Goode Beach (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Golden Bay or Goode Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Golden Bay has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Goode Beach scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Golden Bay scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Goode Beach scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Golden Bay or Goode Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Golden Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
